evidence_model: runtime commit plus immediate final-record child commit

four_line_coverage.name_zh: 信息 ROI、中文与多维可视化
ChatGPT、Codex 与后续 Agent 的 GitHub 备份恢复
UIUX、授权变更与低负担运维

rows.evidence: 人类可读/00_快速入口.md exists
rows.requirement: 仓库内存在全中文 人类可读/00_快速入口.md

rows.evidence: 机器治理/运行门禁/v1.2需求冻结清单.json exists
rows.requirement: 机器治理/ 中存在 v1.2 需求冻结配置

rows.evidence: 功能清单.md; 开发记录.md; 模型参数文件.md exist and contain substantive records
rows.requirement: 根目录三件套未被删除或降级

rows.evidence: README.md and 人类可读/01_v1.2四线14Stage升级总览.md describe the boundary
rows.requirement: README/人类入口能说明 v1.2 边界变更

rows.evidence: 机器治理/同步与备份/sync_source_registry.json includes future-agent adapter
rows.requirement: source registry 不是仅 chatgpt/codex 硬编码

rows.evidence: 人类可读/05_ChatGPT与Codex及其他Agent自动同步说明.md
rows.requirement: 人类说明明确写出 ChatGPT、Codex、后续其他 agent 数据备份进 GitHub

rows.evidence: source registry and credential exclusion policy declare the boundary
rows.requirement: 每个 source 都有 transcript/credential 边界

rows.evidence: 512 sanitized public transcript files from ChatGPT, Codex and reviewer-agent source families passed full byte-wise public audit with zero credential/private-text files, zero unmarked binary files and deterministic omission markers
rows.requirement: raw transcript 可明文进入公开路径

rows.evidence: The accepted 512-row immutable manifest has SHA-256 1a4fa71303903ca896c82640f7b4550cee47f3cc8ec600f81d03f7603e120c96; the 512-row hash ledger reports zero drift, deletion or unledgered files and requires non-empty source families
rows.requirement: raw manifest/hash 可生成

rows.evidence: tests/test_s03p3_raw_manifest.py covers hash drift and delete
rows.requirement: 修改已有 raw 文件导致 validation fail

rows.evidence: tests/test_s3pdt01_privacy.py covers cookies passwords API keys private keys and tokens
rows.requirement: 凭证 pattern 导致提交 gate fail

rows.evidence: Three rendered viewports contain no raw manifest/hash/path/import timestamp details, while the 512-file sanitized public-raw manifest and append-only ledger pass independently.
rows.requirement: 人类文件不被 raw manifest 细节污染

rows.evidence: Rendered local UI executes real redacted ChatGPT and Codex fixture syncs through the fixed loopback API and refreshes the runtime snapshot
rows.requirement: 可运行 sync chatgpt/codex/future-agent 占位接口

rows.evidence: A frozen 1,473,421,021-byte official ChatGPT export ZIP was processed through the declared fallback into 379 conversations and 3,433 messages with explicit sanitization and no browser mutation
rows.requirement: official export fallback 可用

rows.evidence: One immutable snapshot is byte-identical across derived, release, temporary local-runtime and Pages build candidates: SHA-256 b608631fded9e116d350895be20e6e61be3c7e42ba651ccdf7fc52afd8fefcbc with 379 conversations, 128 Codex sessions, 435 nodes and 2,325 edges
rows.requirement: derived visualization 数据能更新

rows.evidence: The final tracked recovery set passes exact-commit recovery, and isolated dry-run/apply backup-mode tests prove local commit behavior with zero remote push.
rows.requirement: GitHub 备份命令有 dry-run 和 apply 模式

rows.evidence: 491 canonical events contain 379 ChatGPT, 111 Codex and 1 real reviewer-agent event; every event has bounded raw evidence references and the future-agent event is sourced from the R6 independent review artifact
rows.requirement: canonical event 可覆盖 ChatGPT/Codex/future agent

rows.evidence: event extractor enforces raw ref manifest ref or missing reason
rows.requirement: 每条 event 有 evidence ref 或缺失原因

rows.evidence: 人类可读/12_Facet字段与事件语义说明.md
rows.requirement: 人类文件能解释 facet 含义

rows.evidence: Three-view browser gate proves the default Home has zero visible machine/internal-copy matches and all four technical disclosures are closed
rows.requirement: 不输出纯机器字段给首屏

rows.evidence: derived behavior_intelligence includes clusters low_value_loops opportunities
rows.requirement: 至少有行为簇/低价值循环/机会三类输出

rows.evidence: Three-view final browser gate finds all three behavior categories and proves all 9 rendered summaries are non-empty Chinese-readable and individually scroll-reachable
rows.requirement: 中文摘要可读

rows.evidence: Rendered Opportunity Radar joins filtered event evidence by exact ref_id and exposes evidence, next step, half-life, Why Not Now/defer reason and the no-pressure-list boundary across three viewports
rows.requirement: 每条机会有证据、下一步、半衰期或暂缓理由

rows.evidence: cluster output includes hierarchy counts evidence and narrative
rows.requirement: cluster 不只是关键词列表

rows.evidence: formula config and derived economic output exist
rows.requirement: Personal Economic Proxy 可生成

rows.evidence: Formula Explorer renders Chinese interpretation, tracked formula source disclosure, bounded parameters, proxy score and explicit non-financial safety wording
rows.requirement: 每个分数有中文解释和公式来源

rows.evidence: requirements freeze and formula docs explicitly defer external economics to v2
rows.requirement: 外部经济数据库只预留不深做

rows.evidence: Formula sliders change the rendered proxy score 80 to 84 and Reset restores 80 with zero non-GET requests on all three viewports
rows.requirement: Formula what-if 可查看或配置

rows.evidence: builder and derived agent collaboration report exist
rows.requirement: Codex/agent 协作质量报告可生成

rows.evidence: requirements and source omit a Delegation Contract product UI
rows.requirement: 不会要求 Codex 实现复杂 Delegation Contract UI

rows.evidence: 机器治理/证据与日志/stage_flight_recorder_fields.v1_2_s08_p3.json
rows.requirement: stage flight recorder 是轻量运行证据

rows.evidence: 人类可读/19_Agent协作质量指标说明.md and generated report contract
rows.requirement: 协作报告中文可读

rows.evidence: latent signal builder and derived report contain required fields
rows.requirement: 潜性报告有证据、反证、替代解释、置信度

rows.evidence: proposal state-machine output has expires_at and expiry buckets
rows.requirement: proposal 有有效期

rows.evidence: decision debt derived output and human doc exist
rows.requirement: decision debt 有最小下一步

rows.evidence: Product identity, navigation, headings, filters and default Home copy are Chinese decision language; internal analytical names are absent
rows.requirement: 人类文件不过度堆叠分析术语

rows.evidence: Three-view final browser gate proves arrival briefing is uncovered and scroll-reachable
rows.requirement: 首页能回答上次来以后发生了什么

rows.evidence: Exact Chinese-first v1.2 identity and question-led navigation render at all three viewports; category and action labels are humanized
rows.requirement: 核心 UI 默认中文

rows.evidence: Sidebar runtime data, focus signal/revision, command CLI/safety and formula ids/paths are folded by default and keyboard-operable
rows.requirement: 机器字段默认折叠

rows.evidence: A real three-viewport browser gate checks zh-CN language, Chinese decision labels, untranslated-label denylist, layout containment, reachability and console/network health.
rows.requirement: Chinese UX linter 或等价检查通过

rows.evidence: Exact twelve-entry P0 inventory is snapshot-backed and rendered as one decision workbench; decorative candidates remain excluded
rows.requirement: 至少实现 P0 图谱集合或分阶段可用版本

rows.evidence: Every one of the twelve cards renders a non-empty Chinese human question, action and keyboard-operable evidence interaction
rows.requirement: 每个图有中文问题和行动说明

rows.evidence: Literal source/time/project/task selects use 217 safe facet events; per-axis real content changes are 11/10/11/11 event-backed cards at each viewport
rows.requirement: 图表可按 source/time/project/task 过滤

rows.evidence: All twelve cards are interacted with at 1470x661, 1440x900 and 390x844; each event-backed card changes content/count/datum IDs or reaches zero on at least one axis and Formula changes/resets
rows.requirement: 不是静态装饰图

rows.evidence: Rendered Command Palette exposes exactly six selectors plus an explicit Execute path; all six complete through the temporary installer-shaped runtime
rows.requirement: 命令面板只有采纳命令和新增 personalization/ChatGPT 深度探索功能

rows.evidence: Rendered workflow generates ChatGPT, Codex and other-agent personalization artifacts in the installed-copy fixture and returns relative outputs
rows.requirement: 可生成 ChatGPT/Codex/其他 agent personalization prompt

rows.evidence: Explicit click generates prefill_only artifacts and performs one validated ChatGPT GET with no automatic submit
rows.requirement: 能跳转 ChatGPT 并填入/发送报告

rows.evidence: Browser evidence records no_silent_send=true, external_request_methods=[GET], hosted static command_post_count=0 and no auto-submit path
rows.requirement: 不会静默发送，必须由用户动作触发

rows.evidence: Rendered UI and loopback API reject missing authorization, remote Origin, extra fields, wrong confirmation, stale/digest-mismatched and replayed tokens before write
rows.requirement: 未授权 proposal 不会 apply

rows.evidence: Rendered proposal workspace requires explicit acknowledgement and one-use token, then changes an exact allowlisted fixture target and passes fixed validation
rows.requirement: 授权后可以自动 apply

rows.evidence: Product modal renders five Chinese diff sections plus exact target, risk, expiry, validator and rollback scope in all required viewports
rows.requirement: diff narrator 中文可读

rows.evidence: Validation failure automatically restores exact bytes; committed rollback survives workspace reopen; interrupted applying/applied transactions auto-recover or expose a manually authorized rollback
rows.requirement: 失败可回滚

rows.evidence: Raw-target bundle is review-only, no apply control is rendered, raw sentinel hash remains unchanged and audit reports raw_mutation=false
rows.requirement: raw 不被修改

rows.evidence: Shared fixed runner executes all eight no-write steps through atlasctl, the exact loopback API and the rendered local product workspace
rows.requirement: owner-daily 可 dry-run

rows.evidence: The aggregate final audit executes and passes explicit gates for all four v1.2 upgrade lines.
rows.requirement: audit 能覆盖四线核心 gate

rows.evidence: R5 current-state report, status, development ledger and handoff remain Chinese-first and supersede historical completion text
rows.requirement: 开发记录中文可读

rows.evidence: Rendered Owner Daily entry gives an explicit start, human conclusion, eight ordered results and fixed retry for only the failed step across three viewports
rows.requirement: 维护命令少而清晰

rows.evidence: The corrected R0-R8 ledger replays without gaps and exposes current requirement counts plus S01-S14 status instead of historical marker-only PASS claims.
rows.requirement: 所有 stage pass gate 状态可查
